assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Systematic force-upgrade to 1.31 when 1.30 reaches EoS' for Regular channel clusters

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states Extended channel clusters get 'up to 24 months total support' and 'No forced upgrade at standard EoS' with force-upgrade only at end of extended support

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response states No channel clusters get 'systematic force-upgrade to 1.31 at EoS' and 'Per-nodepool disable auto-upgrade settings are overridden during EoS enforcement'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response includes specific gcloud command for 30-day 'no upgrades' exclusion and states 'Only a 30-day no upgrades exclusion can defer (temporarily)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response recommends 'Proactive manual upgrade (recommended)' as Option A and provides detailed action plan with timeline

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response includes specific Cloud Logging query for EoS monitoring: 'resource.type="gke_cluster" jsonPayload.reason="MinorVersionAtOrNearEndOfSupport"'

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking deprecated APIs with kubectl metrics command but does not specifically mention the deprecation insights dashboard

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the concept of 'snowflaking' or warn about manually freezing versions and their associated risks
